metadata.description: Scripted CAD for AI agents — write TypeScript + Replicad, get STEP/STL. Headless MCP server for geometry tools; optional VS Code extension for live 3D preview.

plugins.name: shapeitup
plugins.description: CAD scripting toolkit: create/modify .shape.ts files, validate geometry, check collisions, export STEP/STL via Replicad + OpenCascade. Runs headless; live 3D preview available if the ShapeItUp VS Code extension is installed.
